rulings.Case Title: 2154 TAYLOR LLC VS. DENNIS A THOMPSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 5, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT CATHLEEN THOMPSON, DENNIS THOMPSON, BETH BLEDSOE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer under the SFRO § 37.9A and the Ellis Act. The SFRO mandates specific order that notices shall be filed and served. Plaintiff has strictly complied with such procedure. Allegations in the complaint, as well as exhibits provided, are taken as true for the purposes of ruling on the demurrer. However, even if the exhibit attached to the complaint is ambiguous, the Court will construe it as alleged by plaintiff. (See SC Manufactured Homes, Inc. v. Liebert (2008) 162 Cal.App.4th 68, 83.) = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD B. ROMINE VS. BLAIR ADAMS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 5, 2019 line 8. PLAINTIFF RONALD ROMINE MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED. Defendant shall complete Form Interrogatories and specially-prepared interrogatories without objections (except, if attorney-client or work product privilege is asserted) and deliver to Plaintiff no later than 5:00pm on June 10, 2019. Defendant shall respond to the request to produce documents and other tangibles without objections (except, if attorney-client or work product privilege is asserted) no later than 5:00pm on June 10, 2019. Tentative ruling subject to opposition. Motion to Deem Matters Admitted is GRANTED pursuant to CCP section 2033.280, subject to opposition. Discovery Sanctions are GRANTED for fees and expenses in the amount of $1,335, subject to opposition. = (501/CFH)
